title: Marksman Basket, Metal, Green, Medium
features: Enhance your garden, balcony, or patio with the Marksman 16" (40cm) Hanging Basket, designed for both style and functionality. Made from sturdy metal, this weather-resistant hanging basket provides a secure and durable solution for displaying your favorite flowers, ferns, or trailing plants. The strong metal chain ensures reliable support, making it easy to hang from hooks, pergolas, or wall brackets. Perfect for adding a touch of nature to any outdoor space, this decorative yet practical basket is ideal for both beginner and expert gardeners. Its classic design complements any setting, providing an elegant way to showcase your plants all year round.
40CM (16") SIZE: Ideal for flowers, plants, and trailing vines to enhance any space.
INCLUDES STRONG HANGING CHAIN: Securely hangs from hooks, brackets, or pergolas.
WEATHER-RESISTANT: Designed to withstand outdoor conditions without rusting.
DECORATIVE & FUNCTIONAL: Adds a classic touch to gardens, patios, and balconies.
EASY TO INSTALL & USE: Lightweight yet sturdy construction for effortless setup.
PERFECT FOR VARIOUS PLANTS: Suitable for bedding plants, ferns, or cascading flowers.
